patient_summary: Olivia, female, DOB 05/05/1952 (age 73), primary phone +1 310 556 1256. Active diagnoses documented include mixed dyslipidemia, essential hypertension (benign), postoperative/unspecified anemia, and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Major recent procedure: colonoscopy with biopsy on 02/21/2025 at Piedmont Newnan Hospital (Haroon, Mustafa, MD). Key abnormal labs from 07/03/2023: ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), iron 41 ug/dL (L), iron saturation 15% (L), triglycerides 158 mg/dL (H), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (L). PHQ-2 and PHQ-9 scores recorded as 0 on 03/28/2023. Care team includes Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP) and multiple specialists at Piedmont (cardiology, pulmonary, gastroenterology). Conflicting records note varying legal sex entries and inconsistent tobacco use and functional assessments; these conflicts are preserved for reconciliation.
